claim.summary: Fix Receipts OpenClaw plugin install blocker
claim.details: OpenClaw blocked the receipts plugin install because openclaw/plugin.js imported child_process. Reworked the runtime plugin to write receipts in-process with fs/path/crypto plus schema and Markdown modules, removing subprocess execution from the plugin adapter. Documented required hooks.allowConversationAccess=true policy and added tests for the safe writer.

evidence.label: OpenClaw plugin install verification
evidence.note: Verified install now succeeds without --dangerously-force-unsafe-install; remaining runtime diagnostic requires explicit hooks.allowConversationAccess=true for agent_end conversation access.

recommended_next_action: Review the receipt and supporting evidence.
